name: Dcorp F&B Enterprise Ecosystem
description: A hybrid (On-premise & Cloud Microservices) POS and enterprise management ecosystem serving major F&B chains such as Highland Coffee and Golden Gate, covering order lifecycle, pricing, promotion, loyalty, and centralized operational reporting.
architectureHighlights: Architected robust backend services in .NET Core and Java to process massive daily transaction volumes.
Engineered reliable Big Data pipelines and synchronized data between offline POS terminals and the cloud.
Designed highly available infrastructure utilizing Redis and Kafka for high-throughput queuing.
Defined cross-service API contracts and event schemas to standardize integration between POS, HQ, and partner systems.
businessImpact: At Dcorp Vietnam, this platform ensured uninterrupted operations and real-time analytics for nationwide restaurant chains, supporting high daily concurrency and revenue-critical transactions. The architecture reduced downtime risk, shortened release lead time for franchise features, and improved operational visibility for both store-level and head-office decision making.

name: Go Food and Beverage Ecosystem (GoF&B)
description: A comprehensive strategic technical solution for the F&B industry, managing orders, POS, kitchen workflows, promotion execution, and multi-branch operations.
architectureHighlights: Led R&D for exploring and applying new technologies
Designed highly scalable backend architecture
Managed a cross-functional team of 40+ members
Introduced architecture review and release governance practices across backend, frontend, and mobile streams.
businessImpact: At MEDIASTEP, this ecosystem improved transaction throughput and platform reliability for high-volume F&B operations. The architecture enabled business teams to launch campaigns faster, manage inventory workflows consistently across multiple storefronts, and reduce release risk during high-traffic business periods.

name: Brighter Path
description: An educational platform designed to empower ethnic women through structured learning paths, accessible web UX, and progress tracking for community-driven training programs.
architectureHighlights: Developed a responsive learning portal
Integrated secure user management and progress tracking
Built modular content and enrollment flows to support iterative curriculum expansion.
businessImpact: At ALTSOURCE VIETNAM, this platform expanded access to digital education for ethnic women in underserved areas. Strong availability and usability improved learner engagement, while structured learning analytics gave stakeholders clearer evidence for scaling and continued program investment.

name: My Fertility Health: Clinic Management
description: A clinic management platform supporting appointment operations, care workflows, and treatment data tracking for fertility-focused services.
architectureHighlights: Designed a scalable service architecture for clinic operations and appointment workflows.
Built API integrations between ReactJS frontend and .NET Core/Golang backend services.
Optimized MS SQL data models and query paths for day-to-day operational tasks.
businessImpact: At ALTSOURCE VIETNAM, this project standardized clinic operational workflows and improved treatment data visibility. The platform stability helped operations teams handle patient volume more effectively during peak periods.

name: Arcadia Drilling: Process Management System for Water-Related Issues
description: A process management system for drilling operations, focused on digitizing water-related incident workflows and cross-role operational coordination.
architectureHighlights: Designed extensible process architecture for field incident handling scenarios.
Delivered backend services with .NET Core/Golang integrated with ReactJS interfaces.
Implemented centralized operational data flows on MS SQL with Azure infrastructure.
businessImpact: At ALTSOURCE VIETNAM, this project improved consistency in water-related incident handling, reduced response time, and strengthened collaboration across field operation teams.

name: Pacific Architectural Wood Products: Door Production Process Management
description: A production process management system for a wood manufacturing business, focused on door production workflow, progress tracking, and cross-team operational coordination.
architectureHighlights: Designed business architecture for production workflows and stage-based order status tracking.
Implemented backend services with .NET Core/Golang integrated with Angular admin interfaces.
Optimized operational data storage and query performance on MS SQL within Azure infrastructure.
businessImpact: At ALTSOURCE VIETNAM, this project digitized door manufacturing workflows, improved real-time production visibility, and reduced coordination delays across factory operation teams.

name: Trimet Subway Camera Surveillance
description: A modernization project for subway camera surveillance publishing and monitoring, focused on stream stability, visibility, and operational responsiveness.
architectureHighlights: Optimized video streaming and data publishing pipelines
Enhanced system security and monitoring capabilities
Refined incident-oriented telemetry and operational dashboards for support teams.
businessImpact: At ALTSOURCE VIETNAM, this project delivered a reliable real-time surveillance workflow for subway operations with stronger monitoring and security controls. Stream and publishing optimizations reduced buffering, improved operational response during peak usage, and increased confidence for transit operations teams.

name: Hanbiro CRM Call: Call Management Center
description: A CRM Call platform for call-center operations, customer-care workflow handling, and support team coordination.
architectureHighlights: Designed real-time call handling and support status tracking architecture.
Built desktop workflow application with Electron, Reactjs, and Node.
Optimized operational data storage and query flows on MySQL.
businessImpact: At HANBIRO VIETNAM, this project helped call-center teams centralize call operations and improve service-response quality through better workflow visibility.

name: Asein: Migration from JSP/Servlet (Java) to Vuex
description: A front-end modernization project for Asein's company website, migrating from legacy JSP/Servlet architecture to a Vuex-driven stack.
architectureHighlights: Refactored UI architecture from JSP/Servlet pages to a Vuex-centric front-end model.
Standardized state management for key business modules.
Maintained compatibility with existing Java backend integrations.
businessImpact: At HANBIRO VIETNAM, this migration reduced maintenance complexity for legacy UI layers and enabled faster feature iteration with a more consistent user experience.

name: Hanbiro Groupware: Business Management Website
description: An enterprise groupware platform for internal operations, workflow management, and cross-department collaboration.
architectureHighlights: Implemented internal workflow and business-management modules.
Integrated multi-service backend with Golang/PHP and Angularjs/Reactjs front-end layers.
Improved MySQL data query performance for high-usage operations.
businessImpact: At HANBIRO VIETNAM, the platform standardized internal business workflows and improved operational collaboration across multiple departments.

name: Hanbiro HR: Timekeeping, Holiday, and Payroll Management (Web/App)
description: An HR platform for timekeeping, leave management, and payroll operations across web and mobile applications.
architectureHighlights: Designed flexible payroll and attendance modules for HR operations.
Built React-Native mobile flows synchronized with web admin data.
Structured Laravel APIs and MySQL data flows for daily HR workflows.
businessImpact: At HANBIRO VIETNAM, this product automated core HR operations, reduced manual overhead, and improved transparency in people-operation data.

name: Hanbiro CRM: Supply Chain Management
description: A CRM platform for supply-chain management, order tracking, and operational data coordination across business units.
architectureHighlights: Designed a scalable CRM architecture for supply-chain workflows.
Integrated GraphQL and Reactjs to optimize context-based data retrieval.
Built high-throughput services with Golang and MySQL.
businessImpact: At HANBIRO VIETNAM, this system improved supply-chain visibility, reduced cross-team information bottlenecks, and supported stronger operational decision-making.

name: Learning Chinese for Japanese
description: A mobile learning application helping Japanese users improve Chinese through interactive lessons, structured exercises, and progress-oriented practice journeys.
architectureHighlights: Developed cross-platform mobile views using React-Native
Integrated interactive language exercises backed by a .NET Core API
Contributed to content delivery flow and user progression tracking for repeat learning usage.
businessImpact: At FPT SOFTWARE, this app delivered a focused language-learning experience for a niche audience and maintained strong recurring usage through interactive lessons. The project validated mobile-first education delivery for international learners and supported product positioning in a specialized language market.

name: Medical Information Management
description: A healthcare mobile application enabling users to book appointments, manage reminders, and receive follow-up notifications with clinically relevant timing.
architectureHighlights: Architected a secure backend to manage sensitive user medical records
Implemented real-time push notifications for patient scheduling
Supported patient workflow consistency through service-side validation and reminder orchestration.
businessImpact: At FPT SOFTWARE, this product streamlined appointment workflows and prescription reminders for clinic users. It reduced missed bookings, improved patient follow-up consistency, and helped clinics coordinate more predictable daily appointment operations.

name: Riolish Mobile App
description: An integrated admin web and mobile learning platform supporting English teaching operations, learner engagement, and content delivery for Vietnamese users.
architectureHighlights: Developed a robust API for content delivery
Built cross-platform mobile learning experiences
Supported role-based administration flows for content, user, and course management.
businessImpact: At VINHDANH COMPANY, Riolish created a scalable digital learning channel combining admin web and mobile learning flows. The platform improved learner retention, expanded service delivery for Vietnamese users, and enabled more structured operations for education teams.

name: Toshiba's Book Reading App
description: Collaborated on the analysis and implementation of a digital reading application for Toshiba, focusing on document flow, readability, and stable user interaction.
architectureHighlights: Contributed to software requirement analysis using StartUML
Collaborated closely with cross-functional teams to design document rendering flows
Supported quality assurance preparation through documentation and requirement alignment activities.
businessImpact: At FPT SOFTWARE (internship phase), this project contributed to delivering a stable and user-friendly digital reading experience aligned with Toshiba's product quality expectations. It also provided early exposure to enterprise delivery standards and cross-functional collaboration practices.

name: Datasa E-Commerce Platform
description: A complete e-commerce platform for computer and mobile products, including customer storefront flows and an administrative portal for catalog and operations management.
architectureHighlights: Developed dynamic product catalogs and secure checkout flows using ASP.NET MVC
Designed a comprehensive relational database schema in Microsoft SQL
Implemented order and product management workflows for day-to-day business operations.
businessImpact: At DATASA.NET, this project established an operational e-commerce sales channel with both storefront and admin capabilities. It improved product management efficiency, simplified operational control for admins, and enabled sustainable online revenue growth.
